Name: Ansaldo Energia
Description:
Ansaldo Energia Group is an international leader in the power generation industry and a key player in the energy transition. The company is owned by CDP Equity, Cassa
Depositi e Prestiti Group, a national promotion institution that has supported the Italian economy since 1850 focusing on strategic investments. Thanks to its transversal skills, Ansaldo Energia Group aims to be a trusted partner for energy security and transition, providing global solutions. Ansaldo Energia Group can supply components (gas turbines, steam turbines, generators), turnkey plants and the most innovative support service solutions to the electricity generation industry.
Ansaldo Energia’s gas turbine fleet can meet the highest standards in terms of emissions into the atmosphere. The whole fleet is already capable of burning from 40 up to 70% of hydrogen in mix with natural gas, depending on the equipment, with the goal to reach 100% by 2030.
Ansaldo Nucleare, a wholly owned subsidiary of Ansaldo Energia, has been active in the nuclear sector globally for over 60 years: it deals with new builds, plant operation
assistance, decommissioning and waste management and is at the forefront in the development of small modular reactors and reactors and IV generation reactors.
Ansaldo Green Tech, born in 2021 as a spinoff of Ansaldo Energia, is active in the field of transition thanks to its AEM electrolysers of its own technology and the development of microturbines, ready to run on CO2 free fuels and to support energy microgrids.

Name: Gamak Makina Sanayi A.Ş
Description:
Turkish industry needs for production. In a short period, we started the production of the first electric motor originating in Turkey. We created an alternative to eliminate the problems related to the cost, spare parts supply, and prices caused by the use of imported motors. We were appreciated for our quality and continued to grow and develop day by day.

We have become one of the most important electric motor manufacturers not only in Turkey but also in the world. With our electric motors produced in the power range of 0.06 kW - 4000 kW, we have managed to meet almost all motor needs in the industry. We produced almost every part required for the production of electric motors in our facility; we became one of the two manufacturers in the world that can produce its wires. We established one of the leading laboratories in Europe; we made a breakthrough in efficiency.

In our facility, which is one of the few electric motor factories in the world where all production is gathered under a single roof, we can produce 1,500,000 products per year with aluminum and cast iron bodies, 0.06 - 4,000 kW power, 56 - 450 type range. With our competent workforce and state-of-the-art machinery, we are taking our production and quality to the next level every day. In our facility, where we have one of Europe's leading laboratories, we bring our products to standards to meet the highest efficiency classes. As a result of our R&D studies, we produce high-efficiency motors (IE2 - IE3), and we also create the necessary infrastructure for the production of new-generation high-efficiency motors (IE4). Thanks to this potential, we carry out production in a fast, dynamic, and flexible structure. We take part in important projects in our country and the world (especially in public areas) with our ability to produce special engines for demand and need, which other companies in the world cannot operate.

Name: FAULHABER Drive Systems
Description:
Germany is one of the most important sales markets for FAULHABER drive systems. At the company group's largest and oldest location, the focus is on innovation leadership and comprehensive technological know-how in research, development and production.

An innovative technology for miniature electric motors was first developed at Dr. Fritz Faulhaber GmbH & Co. KG (founded in 1947 and known then as "Dr. Fritz Faulhaber Feinmechanische Werkstätten") and was decisive in shaping drive technology. This newly developed technology was the bell-type armature motor. It forms the foundation for the enormous range of drive solutions offered by FAULHABER. The most important element of this motor is its self-supporting, coreless skew-wound design developed by Dr. Fritz Faulhaber and registered for patent in 1965.

On the basis of this unique technology, the company has for almost 70 years specialised in the development, production and implementation of high-precision small and miniature drive systems and offers them in standard versions, modified designs or as customer-specific complete solutions. They are regarded worldwide as a mark of high quality and reliability in complex and sophisticated fields of application.

Today, there are more than 600 employees at the company site in Schönaich near Stuttgart in Baden-Württemberg (Germany), one of the strongest economic and most important regions for industrial advanced technologies in Europe. In addition to research and development, Dr. Fritz Faulhaber GmbH & Co. KG also invests heavily in state-of-the-art processing and production technology to allow the company to manufacture new and innovative products that become industrial standards. The company has received several awards for its successful and enduring innovation management.

Description:
INATRA S.A. - Industria Andina de Transformadores

Desde el 18 de Julio de 1974, en INATRA hemos desarrollado nuestros transformadores con tecnología propia de punta, contando con profesionales, técnicos y operarios altamente calificados, asegurando sistemas y normas de calidad para cumplir con creces las exigencias del mercado eléctrico nacional.
El crecimiento sostenido desde hace más de cuatro décadas, la experiencia y la confianza depositada por nuestros clientes día a día en los transformadores INATRA, ratifican por sí mismo la calidad e innovación de cada uno de ellos.

Teniendo como objetivo mantenernos a la vanguardia del crecimiento energético del Ecuador, en el 2005 implementamos un Sistema de Gestión de la Calidad bajo los lineamientos de la Norma ISO 9001, así también después de cumplir con los procesos de auditorías al producto y al sistema de gestión de calidad obtuvimos en el año 2010 la certificación INEN cumpliendo así los más altos estándares de calidad nacional e internacional.

Desde nuestros orígenes y hasta la actualidad, en INATRA nos hemos caracterizado por el constante incremento de productividad, superando año a año la cantidad de producción e incorporando nuevos tipos de transformadores, para satisfacer plenamente la demanda industrial y comercial del mercado ecuatoriano.

El espíritu de innovación constante y las necesidades de nuestros clientes, nos obligan a renovarnos y actualizar nuestro departamento de ingeniería y desarrollo de producto, contando para esto con modernas herramientas informáticas que nos permiten diseñar soluciones a cualquier tipo de requerimiento.

Name: Apveek Engineering Technology Australia Pty Ltd
Description:
Introduction to APVEEK Group
The APVEEK Group is a dynamic and innovative organization that specializes in the field of heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and refrigeration (HVACR). With a rich history spanning back to its inception in 2017. The group has continually evolved and grown up and has been establishing ourselves as a leading player in the global HVACR industry.

Our Origins and Expertise
The roots of the APVEEK Group trace back to 2005 with a team with specialized knowledge and technical prowess in the HVAC field. This solid foundation laid the groundwork for the creation of the APVEEK team in 2017, marking the beginning of a journey dedicated to excellence, innovation, and global impact. 

AUCHIEVE Chillers
In 2018, the Apveek management team started building an Australian engineering team and established manufacturing plant in China with our business partners. 
Our aim was to produce Oil-free Chillers under the AUCHIEVE brand name.
As part of this initiative, Apveek has relocated its global head office to Melbourne, Australia.

The AUCHIEVE Engineering Team
AUCHIEVE has been at the forefront of Magnetic Bearing Oil-Free Chiller technology for decades. Our original team members were instrumental in manufacturing the world's first Magnetic Bearing Compressor in Australia during the early 1990s. This pioneering spirit drives our Australian based engineering team to continue working and innovating locally.  
AUCHIEVE is committed to advancing the development of Magnetic Bearing Oil-Free Chillers and exploring new possibilities for global success.
Manufacturing Globally with Quality-Controlled Products
Production of chillers in China commenced in 2010 and we are currently shipping AUCHIEVE chillers from our Chinese manufacturing plant. All AUCHIEVE Oil-free Magnetic Bearing Chiller Units are designed by our Australian Engineering team.

At AUCHIEVE, we are committed to not just delivering high-efficiency chillers.

Name: Greeneco Environment Global
Description:
Greeneco Environment Global is a technology company that provides sales, installation, renovation, maintenance, operation optimization, and technical consulting for boiler, turbines, and auxiliary equipment for coal-fired power plant. 

Our company mission is to work with customers to solve technical problems such as power plant efficiency, safety, and environmental protection through continuous technological innovation, while spearheading the flexibility power plant transformation to adapt to the evolving demands of modern energy systems.

With clean and low-carbon solutions, efficient regulation, rapid load changes, and start-stop peak regulation as key objectives, we are committed to advancing the flexibility power plant transformation by enhancing the operational agility of coal-fired power units. This includes deep peak regulation, rapid ramping, and flexible start-stop capabilities, ensuring that coal-fired power plays a crucial role in maintaining a reliable power supply while supporting the integration and consumption of new, renewable energy sources.

As we continue to drive the flexibility power plant transformation, we focus on optimizing efficiency, reducing emissions, and improving overall system performance, ensuring that our customers are equipped to meet both current and future energy challenges.

In the future, we look forward to establishing cooperative relationship with more outstanding partners and achieving win-win results with integrity and strength!

Name: Aspina México
Description:
ASPINA conceptualizes and nurtures new ideas together with our customers in order to propose optimum "movement" solutions from new perspectives.

As of September 2019, Shinano Kenshi Corporation began the migration of its corporate brand to a new global brand called ASPINA.  

Utilizing our company’s unsurpassed technical and problem-solving ability, which has been accumulated for over a century, we will continue to give form to the hope and comfort of people throughout the world in market areas including industrial machinery, home appliances, household equipment, automobiles, medicine, and social welfare. Our goal is to provide an even greater contribution in these areas on a grand global scale.
 
*ABOUT OUR NEW NAME*
The name ASPINA was formed by placing the letter “A” on both sides of the word “SPIN.” The word SPIN refers to the silk spinning which was the original business of Shinano Kenshi, as well as the spinning of motors. The letter A refers to a brand that weaves Class A products together with customers. ASPINA also refers to the word “Aspire,” sending the message of “eagerness, desire, fervent wish, aim, and intention.”
 
*ENGINEERED TO INSPIRE*
ASPINA contains the concept of using technology (= Engineered) to achieve results that will influence the future of the world (= Inspire). This message conveys how we work to realize new innovation and improvements together with our partners.

What we offer:

*Solutions in Motion*
Through the design, manufacturing, and supply of modules and systems, such as pumps, fans, and motors with reduction gears, we offer technical proposals for rapid issue resolution. We are experts in providing "movement" solutions. 

*Pursuing Compact, Light, Quiet*
To meet the needs of emerging and changing industries, we propose and develop compact, lightweight, and quiet products.

What we serve for:
*Automation
*Life Environment
*Automotive
*Health & Wellness 
*Space 

Contact us today.

Name: Motor-Systems Kft.
Description:
Tevékenységünket leginkább a mérnöki pontosság, valamint a hajtástechnikai ágazatban összegyűjtött több mint egy évtizedes tapasztalat jellemzi. 
Munkánk során kiemelten fontosnak tartjuk, hogy közvetlen, személyes kapcsolatot alakítsunk ki partnereinkkel, és egyéni igényeik, ötleteik figyelembevételével optimális megoldásokat kínáljunk a tervezés és gyártás alatt lévő, illetve meghibásodott gépeikhez.
Folyamatosan törekszünk a fejlődésre és a stabilitásra, melyek érdekében lépéseket is teszünk.
-	Alkalmazottjaink számára folyamatosan képzéseket biztosítunk annak érdekében, hogy munkájukat minél magasabb szakmai színvonalon tudják végezni.
-	Termékkínálatunkat, valamint szolgáltatásainkat folyamatosan fejlesztjük és bővítjük, melyeknek köszönhetően a legmodernebb hajtástechnikai megoldásokkal, minél széleskörűbben és gyorsabban tudjuk kiszolgálni Ügyfeleinket.
-	Partnereink részére rendszeres képzést biztosítunk az általunk kínál termékek, valamint alkalmazhatóságuk minél pontosabb megismertetése érdekében.
-	Versenyképes jövedelmet, valamint a professzionális munkavégzéshez szükséges körülményeket biztosítunk Kollégáink számára.

Fontos számunkra, hogy Kollégáinkkal és Partnereinkkel értékes emberi kapcsolatokat alakítsunk ki és ápoljunk a mindennapokban. Ezen törekvéseink sikerét mi sem bizonyíthatná jobban annál, hogy alkalmazotti állományunkban minimális fluktuáció tapasztalható, valamint számos Ügyfelünk tisztel meg bennünket évről évre folyamatosan bizalmával.

Name: D-GO Mobility
Description:
D-GO by DOGA — Direct Drive for a Smoother Tomorrow

At D-GO, we build what we believe to be the future of e-bike motion: quiet, efficient, regenerative, and perfectly tuned to each ride. Born from DOGA’s 60-year heritage in electric motor systems for automotive and industrial sectors, D-GO brings engineering excellence to the streets — and to the people who ride them.

We design and manufacture direct-drive hub motors that turn urban bikes into clean, reliable, and intuitive vehicles. No gears. No friction. No mechanical noise. Just seamless torque, delivered straight to the wheel.

But D-GO isn’t just a motor. It’s an entire philosophy built around natural pedaling — the sensation that you’re still riding a bike, only better. Our system disappears into the ride: silent, fluid, and weightless. And when you stop pedaling or brake, it gives back — regenerating energy and increasing range.

What makes D-GO different?
We don’t sell off-the-shelf motors. We co-engineer. Every partnership starts with your bike’s DNA — torque profiles, cadence expectations, ride philosophy — and we adapt our firmware, sensors, and interfaces to fit. It’s like a tailored suit, built around your vision.

Our direct-drive motor is the lightest of its kind, built in Europe, and designed for real-world performance:
	•	Up to 65 Nm torque for urban climbs and cargo loads.
	•	Regenerative braking that enhances battery life and reduces wear.
	•	A whisper-quiet ride that feels like gliding.
	•	Zero transmission wear — because we bypass the chain entirely.
	•	Full compatibility with 20” to 28” wheels, no frame redesign needed.

We collaborate with European OEMs, cargo bike brands, and urban mobility pioneers to deliver premium solutions for commuters, families, delivery fleets, and eco-conscious riders. Whether your priority is silence, power, efficiency, or all three — we’re here to build it with you.

Name: Miraimot Mühendislik ve Teknoloji A.Ş.
Description:
Miraimot was founded in 2025 as an engineering focused company working in the field of motion technologies. Our name reflects our perspective: “Mirai” means future in Japanese, and “Mot” refers to motion technologies. Together, they represent our commitment to shaping the future of motion systems through innovation, precision, and reliability.
We design and manufacture custom electric motors and electromechanical actuation systems for demanding applications where performance, precision, and reliability matter. Our solutions are used across sectors such as  Aviation, Robotics, Medical Devices, E-Mobility, and Industrial Systems.
Our product range includes BLDC motors, frameless motors, torque motors, rotary and linear actuators. Each solution is developed with attention to power density, durability, and integration into real world systems operating under challenging conditions.


Miraimot, 2025 yılında hareket teknolojileri alanında mühendislik odaklı bir şirket olarak kurulmuştur. Adımız, perspektifimizi yansıtır: "Mirai" Japonca'da gelecek anlamına gelir ve "Mot" hareket teknolojilerini ifade eder. Birlikte, yenilik, hassasiyet ve güvenilirlik yoluyla hareket sistemlerinin geleceğini şekillendirmeye olan bağlılığımızı temsil ederler.

Zorlu uygulamalarda performans, hassasiyet ve güvenilirliğin önemli olduğu özel elektrik motorları ve elektromekanik eyleyici sistemleri tasarlayıp üretiyoruz. Çözümlerimiz, Havacılık, Robotik, Medikal Cihazlar, Elektrikli Mobilite ve Endüstriyel Sistemlerde kullanılmaktadır.

Ürün yelpazemiz, BLDC motorlar, gövdesiz motorlar, tork motorları ile döner ve lineer eyleyicileri içermektedir.

Name: HYDRAULIC & TRANSMISSION SERVICES LIMITED
Description:
Maintaining our standards

The world looked a little bit different when we set up shop in 1972, but we’ve moved with the times in a fast-moving industry. We’ve amassed a huge amount of expertise in those years, and gathered together an unrivalled range of stock. We know what everything is – and we know exactly where to find it!

Service

We’ve always listened to what our customers want, so we offer 24/7 on-site machinery diagnosis and repair, operated by a team of qualified engineers and state-of-the-art mobile workshops. We also offer certified product and safety testing and service on-site maintenance contracts.

Breakdowns can be costly and stressful, so we provide attentive account management support and you’ll always have a real person to talk to. We’re ISO 9001:2015 accredited for quality management and customer confidence. Maximum service, with a minimum of fuss.

Stock

We hold the parts our customers want: from the tiniest fitting, nut, bolt or valve through power packs and a massive stock range of flexible hoses, to large steel tubing. Because we’ve been trading a long time, we also keep a back-stock of older products that the new boys might consider obsolete. We believe that if you can keep a machine running well, you should. All it takes is a little technical know-how.

Bring us a widget, a grommet, a flange or even a thingummybob and we’ll name it, then match it from stock, track it down elsewhere – or we’ll make it from scratch. And if you want us to fit it, we’ll do that too.

We’re proud holders of ISO 9001:2015, 14001:2015 and BS OHSAS 45001 :2018 we address external environmental issues and run a safe and healthy workplace. Our team strives to continually improve its service and standards and we expect our suppliers to do the same.

Name: FLEX-GEN
Description:
Welcome to the Linkedin page of the 'FLEX-GEN' research project.  The Co-operative FLEX-GEN project, coordinated by CNR-Stems in collaboration with Polytechnic University of Milan and Polytechnic University of Torino, has been funded by the Ministry of University and Research (MUR) under the PRIN program (Prot. MUR n° 2022988F33 2022) and aims to increase know-how and TRL on the Free Piston Linear Generator technology (FPLG). The FLPG is an energy conversion device for the direct electric power generation from the fuel combustion. Compared with the ICE, the FPLG does not need the crank-connecting rod mechanism. Therefore, thanks to the reciprocating free piston traslational movement, chemical energy released by the fuel can be converted in electric power through a linear electric generator directly coupled with the machine.
FPLGs have many advantages such as a simply and lightweight structure, a generally high net efficiency (potentially >50%) due to low friction losses, low pollutant emissions, and finally a high flexibility to operate with different fuels thanks to the variable compression ratio achievable. The three main pillars of the Flex-Gen project are:
1.	Increasing state of the art awareness in university and industrial research about possible applications and architectures of a Free Piston Linear Generator.
2.	Development of robust simulation tools and cutting-edge prototype designs useful to overcome the current technology barriers for ultra-high efficiency and near zero-emission FPLG manufacturing.  0D and 1D simulations will be performed to assess the functionality and different system’s control strategies while CFD simulations will be carried out to define thermo-fluid-dynamic machine’s behavior.
3.	Design, development, and testing of an experimental test bench useful to validate modelling tools developed.
During project activities (scheduled for 24 months), we will periodically refresh this page, keeping readers updated on the main goals achieved.

Description:
Ultra clean engine fuel systems, engine conversions, and complete engines running LPG / propane  or natural gas (CNG / LNG) fuels that will meet current 2022 EPA / CARB / Euro standards in addition to future 2027 - 2031 standards.  We will achieve Near-Zero Emission Standards for most engine platforms.   This technology is applicable to light, medium and heavy duty engines, but the Heavy Duty Engine market is our target market.

Our primary market focus is 10L to 16L engines for Class 7 and Class 8 truck applications in addition to off-highway, agricultural, industrial, marine, and generator applications.  We will work with leading remanufacturing suppliers to rebuild engine cores to CFT specifications followed by installation of the CFT fuel system (LPG or natural gas).   We will also offer alternative fuel conversions for the medium duty 4L to 10L engine market and smaller 1L to 4L range.  

This advanced alternative fuel technology combined with our high performance engine conversions has the potential to revolutionize the diesel engine repower market, restore many thousands of heavy trucks and buses to present day 2022+ EPA compliance.  We will provide engines designed to the same on-road EPA certification for use in construction, agricultural, industrial and marine applications.

Name: IKM Subsea Motor Solutions AS
Description:
We offer standard subsea motors, special motors, drive systems, and services. 

Our standard range of motors have a field-proven design that enables the use of electrical motors in new submerged assemblies. They are typically used in applications for the oil and gas market, renewable energy, aquaculture, and for deep-sea mining. 

Special challenges require special motors and we therefore customize motors to fit exact specifications for a wide range of applications. These include minimization of size and weight, downhole motors, permanent magnet motors, generators, and special certifications like API and ATEX / IECex. 

We offer complete drivelines for our motors that ensure their high performance and reliability in the long run, and perform inspections and services for all types of electrical motors. We collaborate closely with service companies and understand the unique challenges of robust subsea solutions.

The company is fully owned by the IKM group, a complete service company for the energy business with 2300 employees. We continue a successful legacy of subsea motors and have supplied more than 1100 motors over the last 20 years.

We design patented high-efficiency powertrain solutions for OEMs and industrial partners seeking higher performance, lower fuel consumption and reduced emissions.

Our core innovation is a patented engine architecture that completes the full 4-stroke cycle in a single 360° crankshaft revolution, enabling:

 Up to 2× specific power compared to conventional engines
 Lower fuel consumption and emissions, with full multi-fuel capability (gasoline, hydrogen, ammonia, e-fuels)
 Advanced thermodynamic efficiency through independent control of compression and expansion ratios

The technology is scalable across automotive, motorsport, marine and co-generation power systems, offering a practical bridge between high-performance ICEs and low-emission energy solutions.

Recognized as a GAMIC 2024 semifinalist and supported by strategic partnerships, Heart Combustion Engine is building the next generation of efficient and sustainable engine platforms.

Name: Engine Research Center - University of Wisconsin-Madison
Description: The Engine Research Center (ERC) is a world-leading research group at the University of Wisconsin-Madison, dedicated to investigating the fundamental thermo-physical processes that control combustion performance and the pollutant emissions formed during combustion in internal combustion engines. The ERC is devoted to fundamental research on both Spark Ignited (SI) and Compression Ignited (CI) engines, including research through combined experimental studies (with optical and metal engine facilities), computational fluid dynamics (CFD) studies and optical sensing investigations. This work is supported by fundamental studies of fluid mechanics, heat transfer, combustion, sprays, emissions, laser diagnostics and after-treatment systems. Several areas in engine research have been pioneered and extensively investigated at the Center, including Reactivity Controlled Compression Ignition (RCCI) and Low Temperature Combustion (LTC) research.

Name: Rossi BeNeLux B.v.

Rossi
De Rossi groep, met het hoofdkantoor in Modena Italië, is één van Europa ’s grootste producenten  van motorreductoren, tandwielkasten en elektro motoren. 

Rossi heeft als doel gesteld om altijd een stap voor te zijn in het leveren van producten die uiterste betrouwbaarheid bieden in verschillende applicaties  en diverse industrieën.
Voor Rossi is kwaliteit,  het voortdurend investeren en het continue onderzoek naar betere oplossingen en producten een belangrijke focus voor het internationale zaken doen.
 
De afgelopen 60 jaar is Rossi dan ook vaak leidend geweest in nieuwe toepassingen, zoals de universele montage en de modulaire opbouw van de componenten, die later de standaard werd in de markt van aandrijvingen.

Kwaliteit
Sinds ‘92 werkt Rossi volgens kwaliteitscertificaat ISO 9001. Als eerste producent van aandrijvingen in Italië, als tweede in Europa. Om deze reden geeft Rossi als eerste producent van motorreductoren en tandwielkasten en nog steeds als enige een standaard garantie op al haar producten van 3 jaar.

Industriëen
Rossi levert aandrijvingen aan tal van industrieën zoals de voedingsmiddelen industrie, bulkhandling, mijnbouw, staalbouw en energiemarkt. Met een assortiment  van 10 t/m 3.000.000 Newtonmeter bieden wij uitstekende oplossingen. Voor zowel serie productie als taylor made applicaties.

Rossi BeNeLux
De Rossi divisie van Habasit Netherlands is sinds 2 april 2013 een zelfstandige onderneming, onder de naam Rossi BeNeLux B.V. Rossi heeft zich als divisie binnen Habasit Netherlands geconcentreerd op groei en het vergroten van de naamsbekendheid. Het oprichten van een zelfstandige onderneming is een logisch vervolg op het succes van de afgelopen jaren. Rossi BeNeLux is nu een directe dochteronderneming van Rossi S.p.A.

Name: CCC - Continental Controls Corporation
Description:
Continental Controls Corporation (CCC) specializes in advanced technology products that modernize Engine Natural Gas Fuel Systems to meet the latest emissions compliance regulations. Founded in 1968 by Ross Fisher, CCC quickly established a prominent place in the gas turbine industry by developing speed and temperature monitors and fuel control modules used primarily with Solar Turbine engines, which became known as Solar "Black Boxes." CCC continues to offer the Black Boxes to customers around the world. 
CCC is an industry leader in developing innovative and effective Smart fuel metering valves for gas turbine and engine fuel control products. The internal microprocessor continuously computes the fuel flow and precisely adjusts the flow to match the demand from the engine. Our Smart valves can handle the most comprehensive range of fuel quality and are ideal for field retrofit/upgrades and original equipment installation. CCC Valves offer a fast response, a high turndown ratio, and extreme accuracy, especially at light off and acceleration fuel flows.
CCC was the first to standardize wideband UEGO oxygen sensors for gas engine AFR controls, improving linear control technology allowing the same sensor to be used for rich or lean burn operation. Through the improved linear control, and enhanced air and natural gas mixing, we can meet the most stringent emissions requirements. The CCC system can also close loop on a post-catalyst NOx sensor to adjust the O2 sensor set point dynamically. This patented technology results in the most advanced emissions control in the world.
Continental Controls Corporation's vertical integration for producing gas valves is a strategic move that sets us apart from our competitors. By controlling every aspect of the production process, from design to manufacturing, we can ensure the quality and consistency of our products. Vertical integration also allows us greater control over our supply chain by reducing lead times and efficiency.
Primary Industry: Engines and Power Transmission Equipment Manufacturing

Name: MVT Elektrik (Magvatech Turkiye)
Description:
Magvatech automatic circuit reclosers are designed for use on overhead lines in radial, ring and meshed distribution medium voltage networks.

The fundamental designation of automatic circuit reclosers is to provide consecutive auto-reclosing cycles in order to clear transient faults and minimize network outage time. In addition to reliability improvement and reduction of SAIDI (System Average Interruption Duration Index), SAIFI (System Average Interruption Frequency Index) and MAIFI

Magvatech reclosers provide an extensive range of in-built communication functions and enhance the operator’s grid visibility.

Substation Automation
Automatic Circuit Reclosers can be used on substations instead of traditional substation circuit breakers to achieve CAPEX savings during project execution, whether it be a new substation or retrofitting an old one.

The Magvatech integrated substation solution contains a reliable switching module, recloser control with an extensive list of protections, a robust substation mounting kit and also accessories as an option. The mounting kit is comprised of a set of steel components with hot-dip galvanized coating and no welded parts. To accommodate a wide range of substation arrangements, the mounting dimensions, and height of the apparatus can be easily adjusted. In this way, the need for additional adaptation kits is completely eliminated.

Renewable Energy
Magvatech automatic circuit reclosers offer the capability to easily connect various renewable and distributed generation (DG) to the grid and enhance the reliability of the power supply.

Magvatech reclosers have the ability to automatically disconnect the DG from the grid in case of power quality issues and to quickly reconnect when the power supply is stable. It can also perform a Sync check function to check the voltage synchronization of two independent systems.

Name: eD-TEC
Description:
Embracing Change: A Call to Action for a Carbon-Neutral Future
In 2015, the world committed in Paris to a carbon-neutral future. Today, the urgency to act has never been clearer. Recent geopolitical conflicts have highlighted a simple truth: Energy is King.

The automotive industry — led by major players like the VW Group with Porsche, VW, and Audi — has already accelerated into the era of electric mobility. Its success is built on the powerful combination of energy efficiency and renewable energy. While the classic Carnot cycle of combustion engines peaks around 38% real efficiency, modern electric mobility reaches up to 90% across an integrated system. Fossil-fuel-based transport is becoming increasingly constrained.
The next major opportunity lies on the water.

The marine sector offers a unique advantage: resistance decreases as vessels lift and glide.
In simple terms: Displace → Glide → Foil.

What many perceive as a conflict — speed vs. range — becomes a breakthrough when approached holistically. At eD-TEC, it is the core principle behind our entire technology stack:
as speed increases, resistance drops, and range grows.
This is why eD-TEC is building a fully integrated, high-performance technology stack — from water to cloud. With each year, we advance systematically through data-driven development and highly integrated engineering.

Only a complete systems approach unlocks true efficiency.
The moment for transformation is now.
Let’s seize this opportunity and move decisively toward a carbon-neutral future.

- Innovative cooling concepts, such as indirect cooling of the copper windings

Name: US Hybrid
Description:
US Hybrid is a leading designer and manufacturer of advanced zero-emission electric and hydrogen-powered powertrain components for medium and heavy-duty commercial and municipal vehicles. Leveraging its expertise in traction motors, controllers, energy storage, and fuel cell engines, the company offers comprehensive solutions that enable the generation and utilization of hydrogen to power its electric and hybrid-electric systems.

These hydrogen-powered solutions allow US Hybrid's global customers, including municipalities worldwide, to transition their fleets towards more sustainable and environmentally-friendly transportation. The company's focus on supporting hydrogen generation is a key part of its strategy to drive the shift towards a greener future for medium and heavy-duty transportation globally.

Whether powering electric garbage trucks, hybrid delivery vans, or hydrogen fuel cell buses, US Hybrid's cutting-edge powertrain technologies that integrate hydrogen generation are at the forefront of this transformation. Name: Toka Technologies
Description:
Toka's continuously variable transmission (CVT) technology is designed for power levels ≤ 45 kW (xEV & ICE). Key applications include:

 2W Transmission (hybrid/EV CVT, 15–25% savings)
 LEVs/LCVs (e-Axle urban hybrid/EV drivetrains)
 Marine Propulsion (hybrid, part-load efficiency)
 Generators (fuel savings at partial load)
 Robotics (VSAs, low backlash, AGVs/AMRs)
 Fitness (stationary trainers, generating 250–300 Wh per workout)
 USVs/UGVs (boosts efficiency, torque & endurance across loads)
 STOL VTOL UAVs (optimises motor speed for flight modes (hover, take-off, cruise), extending range at 21,000 RPM)

Toka’s patent-pending CVT (PCT/IB2022/055940 – EU, US, JP, IN) leverages proven engineering principles to deliver a customisable, high-performance solution tailored for specific torque, durability & duty cycle requirements. Key Features:

* Full CVT Capability: maintains maximum input torque across all ratios
* Bidirectional Operation: efficient power transfer in both directions
* High Efficiency: achieves 91-94% efficiency (MATLAB Simscape simulation)
* Application Optimisation: configurable ratios (e.g 250%, 374%, 510%)
* High-Speed Input: handles up to 21,000 rpm
* Responsive Control: electronic ratio control (enables modes e.g. eco, power)
* Durable & Low Maintenance: shaft-driven, fully enclosed, (near-zero upkeep)
* Compact & Lightweight: weighs 2.3 kg @ 374% ratio (exclude packaging)
* Energy Recovery: at much higher efficiency ratios than currently possible with electro-mechanical drives

Development Status: Advancing through TRL 4 with validation imminent. Seeking industry partnerships for application development. Partner prototype testing expected Q3 2025.

NEW: Integrated Drivetrain Systems

An integrated drivetrain (motor, controller & CVT) can significantly reduce mechanical integration and control system complexities, thereby accelerating time-to-market for OEMs.

 Contact: bruce@toka.technology for presentations or collaboration.

Name: ActiLub
Description:
High performant and power dense electromechanical systems (e.g. weaving looms, compressors, gearboxes, drivetrains, …) need oil lubrication to reduce friction and resulting wear in a contact between two surfaces and to efficiently dissipate heat from the lubrication points. These systems consist of multiple oil lubricated bearings of various types, which typically operate under different and/or varying conditions (load, speed, temperature). Ideally the lubrication properties have been adapted to these operating conditions. However, in practice in most machinery a single uncontrolled lubricant circuit is used with multiple oil lubricated bearings, compromising the optimal lubrication properties. As such, each individual bearing operates under suboptimal lubrication conditions, leading globally to an increased Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) due to reduced energy efficiency, reduced component lifetime and increased maintenance and downtime.

In that view, ActiLub will analyze and develop strategies to actively control and optimize the local lubricant thermomechanical properties (i.e. viscosity, density, thermal conductivity, specific heat) per bearing (group) by active control of lubricant temperature and flow. This can be achieved through various scenarios (and combinations thereof): (1) conditioning – oil temperature and mass flow rate is preconditioned before entering the bearing by introducing e.g. piezo-electric valves, thermo-electric Peltier elements, heat exchangers or mixing valves (hot and cold oil) and (2) raceway conditioning – shear heating of the lubricant in the contact areas and the solid body temperature are influenced indirectly via conduction towards a Peltier element installed around the bearing surface or by introducing a parallel cooling circuit in a superimposed cold plate/heat exchanger.

Name: TM Kart
Description:
TM Kart S.r.l. is an Italian company specialized in the design, production, and marketing of high-performance kart engines. Founded in 2023 in Pesaro as a spin-off from the kart division of TM Racing S.p.A., TM Kart inherits decades of technical know-how and a legacy of racing excellence. Today, it stands among the most recognized and respected brands in international karting, trusted by both amateur enthusiasts and top-level professionals.

Operating out of a 2,500 m² modern industrial facility in Pesaro, Italy, TM Kart manages every stage of engine development in-house—from research and design to manufacturing and commercialization. The company is driven by a commitment to performance, reliability, and quality, which translates into consistent success on national and international tracks. TM Kart engines are featured in premier karting events worldwide, including the FIA Karting World Championships and the WSK Series.

Under the former TM Racing brand, its engines powered some of today’s top Formula 1 drivers, including Alexander Albon, Charles Leclerc, George Russell, and Max Verstappen. Verstappen notably claimed his final FIA Karting World Championship title in 2013 with a TM Racing KZ10-C engine. TM Kart has continued this tradition of excellence by winning major titles such as the 2024 FIA Karting World Championship KZ, World Cup KZ2, and the International Masters Super Cup.

In 2025, TM Kart merged with OTK Kart Group, backed by BIC Capital and Q Capital, in a strategic move aimed at consolidating global leadership in the karting engine sector.

Beyond speed and competition, TM Kart is also committed to sustainability. Its facility was renovated with energy-efficient systems, photovoltaic panels, and smart automation, prioritizing local sourcing to minimize environmental impact.

Name: Dyno Equip
Description:
DynoEquip specializes in advanced testing solutions for electric vehicles (EVs) and hybrid powertrains, providing a comprehensive range of dynamometers designed for performance assessment and validation. Their offerings include AC dynamometers that cater to various powertrain configurations, ensuring optimal testing for battery-electric, mild hybrid, and fuel cell vehicles. These systems are built for durability and efficiency, supporting automotive manufacturers in meeting stringent market demands and regulatory standards.

Key products include high-speed EV motor dynamometers, which facilitate thorough performance testing of electric motors across diverse technologies, such as permanent magnet synchronous motors and asynchronous motors. Additionally, DynoEquip offers transmission and reducer test stands tailored for e-mobility applications, accommodating the unique requirements of electric drivetrains.

The electric axle test stand integrates inverters, reducers, and motors for comprehensive testing of electric drive units, focusing on performance, thermal behavior, and service life. Powertrain test stands are also available, designed to simulate real-world driving conditions for both two-wheel and four-wheel drive systems, significantly enhancing design and validation efficiency.

DynoEquip prioritizes electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) testing, providing systems to ensure that electric and electronic components function reliably without interference. Their e-motor and electric axle EMC test solutions are designed to meet evolving industry standards, enabling pre-compliance testing and thorough validation in controlled environments.

Overall, DynoEquip’s solutions cover the entire toolchain for e-mobility testing, from individual components to complete systems, ensuring that manufacturers can effectively navigate the complexities of electric powertrain development and compliance.

The LR8 is a rotary hybrid electric engine that generates 9,800 lbs.-ft of torque at 400 rpm, and has a weight of 280 lbs.  

Featured technologies of the engine design include:
1.  It burns hydrogen for combustion with no carbon emissions, but it can also run on conventional fuels which removes any barriers for initial adoption.

3.  All the while achieving a revolutionary power to weight ratio.

Description:
ArenaRED’s focus is the global energy transition and to make any combustion engine completely appropriate for renewable fuels from renewable sources by developing, designing, outsourcing and delivering flexible engine management systems based on combustion pressure sensing.

ArenaRED offers a world unique solution that allows diesel engines to run efficiently on any E-Fuel. With its innovative Direct Hydrogen total FlexFuel injector, Fiber Optical Combustion Pressure Sensor and Chip, engines can achieve the same power output as traditional diesel engines, but with significant reduced emissions and fuel consumption. This advanced retrofitting technology ensures quick implementation and a seamless energy transition to sustainable fuels. Converting Diesel engines into total FlexFuel engines, Hydrogen, Methanol, Ethanol, Gasoline, LNG, LPG, etc.

Name: Tribo Dynamics
Description:
Tribo Dynamics has developed the rotating liner engine (RLE), a unique lubrication concept for traditional internal combustion engines. The RLE incorporates a rotating liner between the piston and the cylinder bores, exploiting the well proven piston and piston ring advantage of the historic sleeve valve engine and applying it to the modern exhaust-emission-driven reciprocating engines.

The RLE technology improves mechanical efficiency, decreases pollutants, increases engine life, and has applications throughout the range of the $50B+ heavy-duty diesel market.

The basic engineering assumption behind the RLE has been confirmed by preliminary results from single cylinder light-duty based RLE Alpha prototype.

Description:
CapEX Power delivers mission-critical transformers, switchgear, and high-voltage systems for data centres, utilities, and industrial clients — achieving 15-week lead times where traditional OEMs can take over a year.

We exist to solve the global grid-equipment bottleneck that threatens the pace of the digital and energy transitions. Our business model fuses Tier-1 manufacturing access with advanced logistics, engineering governance, and project execution capability to deliver what others can’t: certainty of supply, transparency of cost, and unparalleled speed.

From hyperscale data centres to renewable energy plants, from utilities to heavy industry, CapEX Power is redefining how essential electrical infrastructure is procured, delivered, and commissioned.

Our operational mission is clear:

To become the fastest, most reliable global supplier of high-voltage infrastructure for the data, energy, and industrial sectors — underpinned by transparency, speed, and engineering integrity.

The Challenge We Solve

Around the world, the demand for power infrastructure has never been higher. The electrification of economies, the exponential growth of AI-driven data centres, and the rise of renewable generation are creating unprecedented pressure on the supply chain.

The global transformer market has surged by more than 40% since 2022, with many utilities and developers reporting lead times exceeding 24 months for critical high-voltage assets. These constraints are compounded by limited manufacturing capacity, fragmented logistics networks, and a shortage of engineering resources able to deliver large-scale solutions on time and within budget.

Delays in grid connection, curtailment risks, and project overruns now represent billions of dollars in lost opportunity annually. The market’s inertia is stifling innovation at precisely the moment when speed, reliability, and resilience are needed most.

Name: Cooper Onnes
Description:
Presentamos el único equipo de ahorro energético fabricado en España, con certificación y garantía de reducción de consumos. Cooper Onnes es un equipo basado en el fenómeno de la alineación de electrones para conseguir la generación de Pares de Cooper a temperatura ambiente.

Reduce el consumo de Kw en un 8%, con 5 años de garantía.

Basado en un efecto magneto-químico consigue, gracias a sus materiales y procesos de producción, absorber las distorsiones y cargas alteradas en las cabeceras de los cuadros de potencia y devolver a las mismas líneas ráfagas de energía, reduciendo la resistencia que dicha energía produciría en condiciones normales sobre las secciones.
Esta ayuda reduce el consumo eléctrico del circuito ya que minimiza las perdidas de energía, reduce la temperatura de los cuadros y componentes y mejora el rendimiento de los equipos eléctricos y electrónicos.

Kaigia’s modular GFM units can power any vehicle or generator — hybrid or not. Fully compatible with renewable fuels, they deliver scalable, zero-emission performance across land, air, and stationary applications.

Batteries are heavy and hard to scale; conventional engines struggle with renewable fuels. Kaigia bridges that gap — offering a flexible, high-performance alternative built for the clean energy transition.

We’re collaborating with key partners to validate real-world applications — from mobility to microgrids — showing how our plug-and-play platform scales clean power where it’s needed most.

This isn’t just another engine. Kaigia rethinks the engine cycle itself: a purely mechanical system using modulated piston trajectories to better capture the theoretical Otto cycle — achieving higher efficiency, low weight, modularity, and true zero-emission capability.

The transition won’t happen by itself — we’re making it move.
Join us.

Name: Boğaziçi Racing
Description:
Boğaziçi Racing, 2025 yılında Boğaziçi Üniversitesi öğrencileri tarafından kurulan ve dünyanın en prestijli öğrenci mühendislik yarışmalarından biri olan Formula Student organizasyonuna katılmayı hedefleyen bir proje takımdır. Ekibimiz farklı disiplinlerden gelen öğrencilerden oluşur. Bu çeşitlilik, teknik bilgi ile takım çalışmasını birleştirerek yenilikçi çözümler üretmemizi sağlar.



Formula Student, öğrencilerin tasarlayıp ürettikleri araçlarla uluslararası platformda yarıştıkları bir mühendislik organizasyonudur. Biz de Boğaziçi Racing olarak önümüzdeki yıllarda tamamen kendi emeğimizle ürettiğimiz içten yanmalı yarış aracımızla bu süreçte yer almaya hazırlanıyoruz. Tasarım, üretim, analiz, elektronik kontrol sistemleri ve test süreçlerinin tamamı öğrenciler tarafından yürütülüyor. Bu sayede her üyemiz yalnızca teknik becerilerini değil, aynı zamanda proje yönetimi, finans, pazarlama ve takım koordinasyonu yetkinliklerini de geliştiriyor.



Amacımız, Boğaziçi Üniversitesi’nin akademik birikimini mühendislik başarısına dönüştürerek Türkiye’yi Formula Student sahnesinde en iyi şekilde temsil etmektir. Aynı zamanda, ülkemizin otomotiv ve teknoloji sektörlerine nitelikli mühendisler kazandırmayı hedefliyoruz.



Boğaziçi Racing olarak bilgi paylaşımını önemsiyor, teknik süreçlerimizi açık kaynak olarak yayımlayarak mühendislik eğitimine katkı sağlamayı amaçlıyoruz. Ayrıca YouTube kanalımızda Türkçe teknik içerikler üreterek genç mühendis adaylarına ilham vermeyi hedefliyoruz.



Boğaziçi kültürünü, disiplinler arası iş birliğiyle birleştiren ekibimiz; üretim, inovasyon ve takım ruhunu ön planda tutarak ülkemizi uluslararası arenada başarıyla temsil etmek için çalışmaktadır.

Welcome to ST Cardan Shaft, where a legacy of precision and innovation has been driving us forward since 2003. To all customers, new and old, near and far, welcome to our factory. Whether for inspection, guidance, negotiation, or investment, let's connect and drive excellence together.

Name: Rebooz Spain
Description:
La tecnología de Rejuvenecimiento de motores REBOOZ es un proceso patentado basado en hidrógeno y agua, con energía 100 % limpia y Verde

La limpieza se realiza sin desmontar ninguna parte del motor y sin utilizar ningún aditivo químico. Además, no tiene que preocuparse por el aceite del motor porque no se dañará. El proceso REBOOZ es sencillo. Usamos 2 litros de agua y los introducimos en la máquina, que luego realiza un proceso de electrólisis para crear hidrógeno Verde. Luego, este se bombea al interior del motor, llegando a todas las piezas del mismo, y, cuando el hidrógeno se quema, el motor se acelera limpiando completamente su interior y expulsando los depósitos de carbono a través del tubo de escape. Conseguimos una reducción de emisiones CO2 de hasta el 70% y un ahorro de combustible de hasta un 30%, además de recuperar la potencia.

Todo el proceso es automatizado y en solo 45 minutos
